heading: Services for Native Americans
label: 9161 Services for Native Americans
text: From amounts reserved under for any fiscal year the Director shall award grants to Indian tribes and to organizations that primarily serve and represent Native Hawaiians (as the term is defined in ) to enable such tribes and organizations to carry out the activities described in .section 9131(a)(1)(A) of this titlesection 7517 of this titlesection 9141 of this title
notes: Amendments2015— substituted “represent Native Hawaiians (as the term is defined in )” for “represent Native Hawaiians (as the term is defined in ”.Pub. L. 114–95section 7517 of this titlesection 7517 of this title2002— substituted “7517” for “7912”.Pub. L. 107–1101997— substituted “Native Americans” for “Indian tribes” in section catchline and in text substituted “to Indian tribes and to organizations that primarily serve and represent Native Hawaiians (as the term is defined in to enable such tribes and organizations” for “to organizations primarily serving and representing Indian tribes to enable such organizations”.Pub. L. 105–128section 7912 of this title
